landmarks: Opening area centers on Eb and related diatonic motion.
A later lift appears around F#/Gb territory.
The final coda stabilizes in F.

uncertainty.message: Bar tracking confidence is modest for inferred meter 4/4.
uncertainty.recommendation: Review bar boundaries manually before publishing a final lead sheet.

uncertainty.message: Several middle-song chord spans favored suspended or altered dominant spellings that were left out of the practical chart.
uncertainty.recommendation: Use the audio draft as validation evidence, not as publication-grade chord truth.
